channel.title: national security on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in national security on Tech Tracker

item.title: VPN apps vs India government, individual privacy or national security.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-xGqGxLFjBRI/YzSfgke70tI/AAAAAAAAOIM/In_c063VEWczGu_Xz3Z81WQfsrtkX7-DQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1664393086040199-0.png" alt=""> In this world, almost all countries since early modern governments begin creating and forming numerous laws to provide and protect privacy of individual in real life and on www aka world wide web of internet as well for instance india after independence in year 1947 created it’s own constitution which actually don’t specifically mention regarding privacy but in it’s fundamental rights according to article 21 guarantees the right to live with human dignity.
